zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Ghent於1032年出生在法國布格時，她的父親Henry de Ghent28歲，母親Sibilla Rose Guines28歲。她於1061年與Aubrey de Vere I在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1100年在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ghent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gent
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Ghant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ghent  , a habitational name for someone from Ghent in Flanders. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Ghent was born in 1032, in Burgundy, France, her father, Henry de Ghent, was 28 and her mother, Sibilla Rose Guines, was 28. She married Aubrey de Vere I in 1061, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1100, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Ghent est née en 1032, à Bourgogne, France, son père, Henry de Ghent, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sibilla Rose Guines, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Aubrey de Vere I en 1061, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1100, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Ghent 1032 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Ghent 28 und ihre Mutter Sibilla Rose Guines 28. Sie hat 1061 in Essex, England Aubrey de Vere I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1100 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Aubrey de Vere I nel 1061, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1100, nel Earls Colne, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Earls Colne, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Ghentが1032年にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Henry de Ghentは28歳，母Sibilla Rose Guinesは28歳であった。1061年にイギリスエセックスでAubrey de Vere Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1100年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Ghent(이)가 1032년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Ghent(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibilla Rose Guines(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1061년 영국 에세스에서 Aubrey de Vere I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Ghent nasceu em 1032, em Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Henry de Ghent, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla Rose Guines, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Aubrey de Vere I em 1061, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Ghent родилась в 1032 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Henry de Ghent было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibilla Rose Guines, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aubrey de Vere I в 1061 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1100 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Ghent nació en 1032, en Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Henry de Ghent, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sibilla Rose Guines, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Aubrey de Vere I en 1061, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
